version_description: I didn t see another version out there capo I leave to the individual I tried to keep it simple so anyone can play it.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Wont Stand In Your Way

content:
Wilson Phillips - Release me

Capo on 5

[Intro]
N.C.
I know that it's time for a change
N.C.
Mmm but when that change comes
N.C.
Will you still feel the same?

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]
How many times have I tried to turn this love around?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I don't want to give up[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch]
But baby it's time I had two feet on the ground[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Can you release me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Can you release me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                             [ch]C[/ch]
Now that you're gone I can't help myself from wondering[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Oh, if you'd have come down from your high[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Would we've been all right?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Release me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Can you release me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Come on baby, come on baby[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
You knew it was time to just let go[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
'cause we want to be free[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]G[/ch]
But somehow it's just not that easy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Come on darling, hear me darling[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
'cause you're a waste of time for me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
I'm trying to make you see[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
That baby you've just got to release me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Release me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Release me[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm not going back to you anymore[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Finally my weakened heart is healing though very slow[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
So stop coming around my door[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
'cause you're not gonna find[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
What you're looking for[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]

'cause we want to be free[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
That baby you've just got to release me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Release me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Release me[/tab]

[Bridge]

...(Now tell me)
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
What is this power you've got over me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
